dashboard_tiles.description: Filter to subscriptions on insights that are tiles of the given dashboard ID.

insights.description: Filter by a comma-separated list of insight IDs.

limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

ordering.description: Which field to use when ordering the results.

resource_type.description: Filter by subscription resource: insight, dashboard export, or AI report.

target_type.description: Filter by delivery channel (email or Slack).
